message:
fix: resolve storage dashboard bugs (#7478, #7479, #7480) (#7484)

- #7478: Use filteredPVCs instead of global pvcs for hasActualData check,
  so clusters with no PVCs correctly show empty state
- #7479: Filter PVCs by cluster reachability in StorageOverview card to
  match Storage page totals when clusters become unreachable
- #7480: Replace greedy regex with K8s-valid name pattern for PVC name
  extraction in pod drilldown, preventing malformed names from quotes
  or YAML artifacts

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
